name: THE WISE AGENT
description: Wise Agent is an all-in-one real estate CRM platform founded in 2002, headquartered in Fountain Hills, AZ. Provides contact management, lead automation, transaction management, and marketing tools for real estate professionals. Named Best Real Estate CRM by Forbes Advisor three consecutive years (2022, 2023, 2024). Preferred CRM partner for the Florida and New York State Associations of REALTORS®. Integrates with 150+ tools.
recent_news: Named Forbes Advisor Best Real Estate CRM for 2022, 2023, and 2024 consecutively.

name: DEALERSLINK
description: Dealerslink is a Broomfield, CO-based automotive SaaS platform providing the largest dealer-to-dealer wholesale marketplace in the US, plus inventory management, appraisal tools, reconditioning workflows, and market analytics. Integrates with 185+ DMS providers, photo platforms, and dealer websites. CompView and True Market Analytics products. Has mobile app. Growing membership base. Founded pre-2023.

name: NCROWD INC
description: nCrowd is a Knoxville, TN-based online employee discount and perks platform, founded 2008. Grew from local Knoxville deals to 170+ markets across two continents. Operates as an online discount marketplace connecting employees to merchant deals. SaaS model with employer clients.

name: WORK ADVANTAGE
industry: HR Tech / Employee Engagement & Benefits AI
description: AdvantageClub.ai (operating as Work Advantage in TX) is a global AI-powered employee recognition, rewards, and benefits platform. Founded 2016 by UCLA postgraduates Sourabh Deorah and Smiti Bhatt Deorah. San Francisco HQ. Serves 15M+ users in 100+ countries with 1,100+ enterprise clients including Concentrix, PwC, BCG, Tech Mahindra. Products: Recognition, Rewards, Wellness, Loyalty, Incentive Automation, Communities, and Pulse. Uses AI for personalized recommendations and engagement nudges.
recent_news: Expanded to 15M+ users globally. Continues rapid enterprise customer growth.

name: BOLT FINANCIAL
description: Bolt is a major one-click checkout platform for e-commerce, enabling retailers to offer Amazon-like checkout UX. Founded 2014 by Ryan Breslow. 610+ employees, CA HQ. Raised $1B+ in total funding; valued at $11B at Series E (Jan 2022, $355M round). Investors: BlackRock, Schonfeld, Invus Opportunities, CreditEase, H.I.G. Growth, Moore Strategic Ventures. CEO: Ryan Breslow returned as CEO (March 2025) after board removed Maju Kuruvilla.
recent_news: Ryan Breslow returned as CEO in March 2025. Company working through controversy and rebuilding after $11B valuation. Former CEO Maju Kuruvilla launched Spangle AI ($15M Series A at $100M valuation, Jan 2026).

Strong sales team with market development representatives nationwide. CEO: Justin Kaufenberg (Co-Founder).

name: BROKERMINT LLC
industry: PropTech / Real Estate Back Office SaaS

Features: Transaction Management, Commission Automation, Accounting, Agent Management, Reporting & Analytics. Integrates with Salesforce, QuickBooks, Dropbox, MLS, and 20+ major platforms. SC entity registered 2021.
recent_news: Rebranded as BoldTrail BackOffice as next generation of platform. Integrated into Inside Real Estate ecosystem.
